title: One in the Chamber [MTS/IV] Quick and Powerful Guns!
description: Content pack for Immersive Vehicles featuring an arrangement of firearms.
body:
One in the Chamber (or OITC if you prefer) is an addon pack for Immersive Vehicles that reshapes handheld munitions-based combat! With a balanced selection of firearms to choose from, you'll have no issues with facing down those pesky mobs and dueling your friends - or enemies! 

Don't worry about reloading, you've always got _one in the chamber_ as these weapons draw ammo directly from your inventory; just like the vanilla Minecraft bow!

More information can be found or requested in the [Official IVLabs Discord Server](https://discord.gg/7GRa62DCg4)

  
_As of April 26th 2026 this mod is distributed under the GNU General Public License v3.0, pack is provided "as-is" from its original author, pack may be freely distributed and modified, this license applies to ALL derivatives and forks._
